examples: It was clinically testified that supplement of folacin for neural tube defect prevention is efficient for women of childbearing ages.
Method: Chromosome fragile sites and breakpoint expression by reducing folacin in TC199 medium were determined in 80 autistic children and 80 normal children.
Preparation of pod solution: cutting stem and lid of108different concentrated folacin acid into pieces and mixed from9cans of each group with12groups in total.
